description: Pre-assembled character kits (PACKs) with bundled gear, pre-calculated nuyen and Karma costs. All costs evenly divisible by 2,000.

rules.ammoCrateNote: Ammo type must be defined by weapon category (light pistol, heavy pistol, assault rifle) at purchase. Categories come in sets of 10. Caseless by default; cased available at same price.
rules.magicPackNote: Many magic PACKs require extra Karma beyond the monetary cost, noted as bonusKarma.
rules.cyberPackNote: Cyber PACKs list Essence cost. Some require a skilljack or skilljack+skillwires.

packs.name: Intro Runner Pack
items: Colt America L36 light pistol with two spare clips
100 rounds of standard light pistol ammo

packs.name: Advanced Runner Pack
packs.notes: Karma cost not explicitly stated in book; inferred from 20,000 / 2,000 = 10.
items: Erika Elite commlink with sim module and subvocal mic
Contacts (3) with image link, low-light vision, and flare compensation
Earbuds (3) with sound link (25¥) and select sound filter (2)
